meta.title: Claw Buddy — Full Spec Reference
meta.description: Complete specification detail for all 7 ClawBuddy roadmap features with technical approach, acceptance criteria, and MVP scope

props.title: Full Specification Reference
props.subtitle: 7 features, 1,050 lines of specs, prioritized MVP through Phase 3
props.meta: Next.js 16.2 | React 19 | Tailwind 4.2 | Supabase | Dark-only (fixing that)

props.content: ClawBuddy is the premier marketplace for AI agents and vibe-coded software. 120 TSX files, 67 routes, 22 Supabase tables — strong bones, but missing the features that differentiate it from a generic app store. These 7 specs take it from prototype to product.

props.label: SPEC 1 — P0 MVP
props.title: Light/Dark Mode + 3 Named Themes
props.subtitle: The entire UI hard-codes dark values. No .dark class toggle, no prefers-color-scheme, no theme provider.

props.content: globals.css sets `--background: #141414` and `--color-gold: #D4AF37` in `:root` with no variant. Hard-coded hex values live in gradient utilities (`.hero-vignette-bottom`, `.skeleton-pulse`), scrollbar colors, and focus rings. A theme system must replace all of these with token references. shadcn/ui components already consume CSS custom properties, so re-theming is a vars-only change — no component code edits.

**Implementation:** Install `next-themes` with `attribute="class"`. Refactor `:root` variables into `.theme-classic`, `.theme-midnight`, `.theme-dawn` blocks, each with light and dark variants (6 total palettes). Replace hard-coded hex in utility classes with `var()` references. Add `ThemeProvider` to root layout. Build theme selector dropdown in navbar with localStorage persistence under `clawbuddy-theme`. Tailwind 4.2 already has `@custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *))` — extend with theme variants via data attributes.

rows.action: Theme token blocks, remove hard-coded hex

props.title: Acceptance Criteria (10 checks)
props.content: System-aware toggle respects `prefers-color-scheme` on first visit. Manual toggle persists via localStorage. All 3 themes render on all 67 routes. No hard-coded hex in gradient utilities. shadcn/ui components correct in all 6 palettes. WCAG AA contrast met. Theme switch < 100ms with no FOUC. Gold shimmer animation works across themes. Focus rings update per theme. Mobile: theme toggle accessible from navbar.

props.title: MVP Cut Line
props.content:
**IN:** Light/dark toggle + system detection, Classic + Dawn themes, localStorage persistence, all gradients tokenized.
**OUT:** Midnight theme, per-user sync to Supabase, theme preview in settings, custom seller themes.

props.label: SPEC 2 — P0 MVP
props.title: Side-by-Side Comparison Feature
props.subtitle: The /compare route exists as a stub. No implementation. Buyers open multiple tabs to cross-reference — broken experience.

props.content:
**Compare Tray:** React context provider (`CompareProvider`) wrapping `(main)/layout.tsx`. State: `compareItems: ListingId[]` (max 4), persisted to localStorage. Floating tray at bottom shows selected items with thumbnails, "Compare Now" CTA. "Add to Compare" button on every listing card and detail page.

**Compare Page:** Replace stub at `/compare`. Feature matrix grid with columns per listing, row groups: Overview (name, type, category, rating), Capabilities (tags as check/cross), Pricing (normalized model comparison), Reviews (rating + sentiment), Technical (compatibility, version).

**AI Summary:** Server action calling LLM with structured data, cached per ID combo. 2-3 sentence natural-language diff.

**Share:** URL format `/compare?ids=uuid1,uuid2`, copy-to-clipboard with toast.

**Mobile:** Stacked cards < 640px, horizontal scroll table with sticky first column.

graph TD
    A[Browse Page] -->|Add to Compare| B[CompareProvider Context]
    C[Search Results] -->|Add to Compare| B
    D[Agent Detail] -->|Add to Compare| B
    B --> E[Compare Tray - floating bottom]
    E -->|Compare Now| F[/compare page]
    F --> G[Feature Matrix Grid]
    F --> H[AI Comparison Summary]
    F --> I[Share Link]

props.title: Acceptance Criteria (12 checks)
props.content: Add to Compare on all browse/search/category pages. Tray appears at >= 1 item. Max 4 enforced. Feature matrix renders all listing columns. Pricing normalized across models. AI summary in < 3s. Share link works in new browser. Mobile usable at 375px. Empty state prompt. State persists across navigation. Individual + clear-all removal. Playwright: add 3 items, verify matrix.

props.title: MVP Cut Line
props.content:
**IN:** Compare tray (max 4), feature matrix (Overview + Capabilities + Pricing), shareable URL, mobile scroll, localStorage.
**OUT:** AI comparison summary, comparison history, similar agents suggestions, PDF export, live metrics from AgentPing.

props.label: SPEC 3 — P0 MVP
props.title: Trailers — Demo Videos & Interactive Previews
props.subtitle: Listings show static text. Buyers can't see agents in action. The demo_video_url column exists but there's no player.

props.content:
**TrailerPlayer component:** Video element with poster thumbnail. Desktop: autoplay muted on hover (first 10s, loop). Click: full-screen overlay with audio + controls + scrubber. Mobile: tap-to-play inline. Formats: MP4/WebM, max 100MB, 5min. Lazy loading via IntersectionObserver.

**TrailerCarousel:** Multiple trailers per listing in horizontal carousel. Dot indicators, swipe, keyboard nav. First trailer = featured (shown on listing cards).

**Thumbnail generation:** Server-side FFmpeg extracts frame at t=2s, stores as WebP in Supabase Storage. Seller can upload custom override. 16:9 aspect, 640x360 min.

**Seller upload:** New section in dashboard listing editor. Drag-and-drop, progress indicator, reorder via drag, max 5 trailers per listing.

**Interactive demo (stretch):** Sandboxed iframe pointing to `demo_url`, 800x600, 5-min session limit.

**Performance:** Supabase Storage CDN, thumbnails as WebP via Next.js Image, autoplay at 480p, full-screen at higher quality, preload: metadata only.

CREATE TABLE listing_trailers (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  listing_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES listings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  video_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  thumbnail_url TEXT,
  title TEXT DEFAULT '',
  duration_seconds INT,
  sort_order INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_trailers_listing ON listing_trailers(listing_id);
-- Storage bucket: trailers (100MB max, video/mp4 + video/webm)

props.title: Acceptance Criteria (13 checks)
props.content: Card: autoplay on hover (muted, 10s, desktop only). Card: thumbnail poster when not hovering. Click: full-screen with audio + controls. Carousel: swipeable, dots, keyboard. Upload: up to 5, progress, format/size validation. Thumbnails auto-generated at t=2s as WebP. Reorder via drag. Mobile: inline tap-to-play. Lazy-loaded video source. Delete removes video + thumbnail. Themed player controls. Playwright: upload trailer, verify on detail page.

props.title: MVP Cut Line
props.content:
**IN:** Single trailer per listing (use `demo_video_url` column, no new table), TrailerPlayer with hover-preview + full-screen, basic upload, mobile tap-to-play.
**OUT:** Multiple trailers (listing_trailers table), carousel, FFmpeg thumbnails, interactive demo sandbox, AI-generated trailers, trailer analytics.

props.label: SPEC 4 — P1 PHASE 2
props.title: AgentPing + Lev Platform Integration
props.subtitle: Buyers can't tell if an agent is online, what it can do, or if it's verified. The marketplace is a catalog, not a living ecosystem.

props.content:
**AgentPing Components:** Import from `community/agentping/` submodule (416 components). Key integrations: StatusIndicator (online/offline/degraded dot), ProcessList (activity tab), DaemonMonitor (seller health dashboard), CapabilityBadge (verified skills), UptimeGraph (30-day history). Create thin adapter components in `src/components/agentping/` that map Supabase data to AgentPing props. Direct imports only — no barrel re-exports (per AGENTS.md 2.5b).

**Lev Hooks:** `useAgentStatus(id)` polls health endpoint. `useSkillDiscovery(id)` fetches skill manifest. `useAgentExec(id, skill)` wraps `lev exec` for try-it flows. `useTrustScore(id)` computes trust from uptime + reviews + verification.

**New tables:** `agent_health` (status, last_ping, uptime_30d, avg_response_ms, success_rate). `agent_capabilities` (skill_name, verified, manifest_url). Cron job polls agent health endpoints.

rows.req: Skill manifest validates + health endpoint responds + > 7d uptime

props.title: Key Dependencies
props.content: `community/agentping/` submodule (pinned commit). AgentPing `@kingly/ui` compatibility with shadcn/ui. Lev platform API for skill discovery. Supabase migrations for `agent_health` + `agent_capabilities`. Themes spec must land first so AgentPing components inherit tokens.

props.title: Phase 2 MVP Cut
props.content:
**IN:** StatusIndicator on cards, capability badges from Supabase array, Verified badge (manual), basic health polling.
**OUT:** Live skill discovery, uptime graphs, DaemonMonitor, automated verification pipeline, `lev exec` try-it demos.

props.label: SPEC 5 — P1 PHASE 2
props.title: Agent-First / Skill Integration API
props.subtitle: Agents are passive products listed by humans. But agents are software that can represent themselves. This is backwards.

props.content:
Agents should be first-class marketplace participants — self-registering, exposing skill manifests, updating their own listings. The marketplace discovers what agents can do instead of relying on humans to describe it.

**Auth:** API keys (SHA-256 hashed, displayed once). Keys scoped to seller account. Rate limits enforced via middleware. Audit log records every mutation.

**New tables:** `api_keys` (seller_id, key_hash, rate_limit_tier). `agent_audit_log` (agent_id, action, payload, ip). Add to `listings`: `skill_manifest_url`, `verification_level`, `api_managed`.

name: "CodeReview Agent"
version: "2.1.0"
capabilities:
  - code-review
  - security-audit
  - test-generation
  - refactoring-suggestions
inputs:
  - type: github-pr
  - type: code-snippet
outputs:
  - type: review-comment
  - type: patch-file
health_endpoint: "https://my-agent.com/health"

props.title: Phase 2 MVP Cut
props.content:
**IN:** Register, update, stats endpoints. API key auth + rate limiting. Basic audit log. Unverified + Reviewed levels (manual).
**OUT:** Skill manifest auto-sync, automated verification, publish endpoint, bulk registration, webhooks, IP allowlisting, agent-to-agent discovery.

props.label: SPEC 6 — P2 PHASE 3
props.title: Auto /now Pages + Gemini Avatar
props.subtitle: Listing pages are static snapshots. No live status, no recent activity, no visual identity beyond placeholders.

props.content:
**Route:** `/agent/[id]/now` — server-rendered, ISR with 60s revalidation. Data from: listing metadata, activity feed (orders + reviews), health metrics (from agent_health), changelog.

**Page sections:** Header (name, avatar, one-line status), Current Capabilities (live list + verification badges), Recent Activity (last 10 events as timeline), Health Dashboard (uptime %, response time chart), Version Info + changelog link, Meta (public URL, embed badge, share buttons).

**lev-now integration:** Import schema types from `plugins/lev-now/`. Create `NowPageAdapter` mapping Supabase data to lev-now schema. Use lev-now renderers for timeline and health sections. Bridge lev-now theme to ClawBuddy theme tokens.

**Badge API:** `/api/badge/[slug]` returns SVG with current status. Sellers embed in READMEs.

**Public URL:** `clawbuddy.com/agent/{slug}/now` with OG meta tags for social sharing.

**Gemini Avatar Generation:** Trigger when listing created with no `image_url` or seller clicks "Generate Avatar". Prompt: "Generate a unique, professional avatar icon for an AI agent named '{name}' that specializes in {category}. Style: minimal, geometric, 512x512, transparent background." Store in Supabase Storage `avatars/` bucket. Regenerate up to 3x/day. History stored for pick-from-previous.

props.title: Phase 3 MVP Cut
props.content:
**IN:** /now page with metadata + capabilities + activity timeline, public URL + OG tags, Gemini avatar (single gen), basic SVG badge.
**OUT:** Health dashboard with charts (needs AgentPing), avatar history, lev-now renderer integration, embed badge with live color, RSS feed, scheduled snapshots.

props.label: SPEC 7 — P2 PHASE 3
props.title: Workshop / Intake Seller Onboarding
props.subtitle: Listing requires filling every field manually. Sellers spend 20-30 min on forms for info that could be auto-extracted in seconds.

props.content:
**Pipeline:** Seller pastes GitHub URL -> API validates + clones to `workshop/intake/` sandbox -> Analyze README, package.json, skill manifest, screenshots -> Extract name, description, capabilities, tags, version -> Return structured `IntakeListing` with confidence scores -> Populate onboarding form -> Seller reviews + confirms -> Create listing.

**UI:** New Step 0 in onboarding: "Import from GitHub" (optional). Auto-filled fields highlighted with "Auto-detected" badge. Low-confidence fields (< 0.7) get warning icon. Live preview card. Diff view for re-imports.

**Security:** Clone to gitignored sandbox, delete after analysis. Skip `.env`/credentials. GitHub URLs only (expand later). Max 500MB repos, 60s timeout. Rate limit: 10/hr/user.

props.title: Phase 3 MVP Cut
props.content:
**IN:** GitHub URL input, README + package.json extraction, auto-populate 5 fields, preview card, skip option, basic errors.
**OUT:** Skill manifest parsing, screenshot auto-discovery, GitLab/Bitbucket support, re-import diff view, bulk import, AI description rewriting.

rows.mitigation: MVP includes Playwright setup. Block merges on green CI.
Theme spec (Spec 1) addresses this. Audit all 120 files.
AGENTS.md already warns. Read node_modules docs before coding.
Pin submodule commit. Integration tests in CI.

rows.risk: Mock data masking real DB bugs
rows.mitigation: Seed Supabase with realistic data, remove mock fallbacks.
Rate limiting + verification in agent-skill spec.

items.title: Light/Dark + 3 Themes
items.insight: System-aware toggle + Classic/Midnight/Dawn themes. CSS custom properties refactor. Tailwind 4.2 integration. **Score: 63**. ~200 LOC, 2-3 days.

items.title: Compare Feature
items.insight: Side-by-side tray (max 4), feature matrix, pricing comparison, shareable URL. /compare stub exists. **Score: 70**. ~500 LOC, 1 week.

items.title: Trailers
items.insight: Demo videos with hover-preview + full-screen. Seller upload. Thumbnail gen. demo_video_url column exists. **Score: 67**. ~600 LOC, 1.5 weeks.

items.title: AgentPing + Lev Integration
items.insight: Real-time agent status, capability badges, trust signals, health monitoring via AgentPing submodule. **Score: 75** (highest CB). ~800 LOC, 3 weeks.

items.title: Agent-First / Skills API
items.insight: Self-registering agents via API. Skill manifests. Verified badges. THE mission feature. **Score: 73**. ~700 LOC, 3 weeks.

items.title: Auto /now Pages + Gemini Avatar
items.insight: Live status page per agent using lev-now. Gemini avatar generation. Public URL + SVG badge. **Score: 66**. ~600 LOC, 2 weeks.

items.title: Workshop / Intake
items.insight: GitHub URL -> auto-populate listing. README + package.json extraction. Confidence scores. **Score: 63**. ~400 LOC, 2 weeks.
